submissions.title: docs(compiler): refresh Rust HIR reading paths
submissions.body:
## Summary

- replace the removed `hir.rs` reference with the current HIR entry point, `lib.rs`
- point reactive-pass readers at `reactive.rs` instead of the removed `reactive_function.rs`

## Validation

Both replacement paths exist at the pinned repository snapshot, the patch passes `git apply --check`, and the modified instruction file has zero broken bindings under attest.

This docs-only correction was found with the attest static instruction-binding scan.

submissions.title: docs: update moved runtime subsystem paths
submissions.body:
## Summary

- update shell and Bake references to their current `src/runtime/` locations

submissions.title: docs: refresh repository architecture guidance
submissions.body:
## Summary

- remove the retired in-repository VS Code extension workflow
- point frontend action guidance to the current event-content helpers
- document the current user, organization, and repository skill sources
- describe the SDK/backend-owned verified-model catalog and structured frontend API

## Validation

Every replacement source and path was checked at the pinned repository snapshot, the patch passes `git apply --check`, and `AGENTS.md` has zero broken bindings under attest.

This docs-only correction was found with the attest static instruction-binding scan.

submissions.title: docs: fix agent metadata script commands
submissions.body:
## Summary

Run `validate-agents.ts` and `sync-agents.ts` through Node from the repository root instead of asking pnpm to treat `scripts/` as a separate package.

## Validation

submissions.title: docs: remove missing transcript inventory
submissions.body:

submissions.title: [skip auto-bump] docs(firebase): replace removed validation commands
submissions.body:
## Summary

- replace three references to the removed `validate-all-plugins.sh` script with the authoritative `validate-skills-schema.py` validator
- fix the traversal from the Firebase plugin directory back to the repository root

## Validation

The validator and Firebase skill path exist at the pinned repository snapshot, both relative command paths resolve, the patch passes `git apply --check`, and the modified Firebase guidance has zero broken bindings under attest.

This intentionally does not edit the externally mirrored Mnemos files. This docs-only correction was found with the attest static instruction-binding scan.
